tasks.label: $(play) Run tests
tasks.description: Run pytest for all tests in tests/

tasks.label: $(graph) Run tests with coverage
tasks.description: Run pytest with coverage report for custom_components/omv

tasks.label: $(search) Lint (ruff)
tasks.description: Check custom_components/ and tests/ with ruff

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy to HomeAssistant (SSH)

tasks.label: $(rocket) Test and Deploy
tasks.description: Run pytest, then deploy to HomeAssistant via SSH
